- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - Node.js Express backend with PostgreSQL
  - CORS enabled for frontend connection
  - RESTful API for student management

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Created project structure with src/ directory
  - Created config/, controllers/, routes/ folders
  - Generated package.json with required dependencies

- [x] Customize the Project
  - Set up database configuration with pg pool
  - Created student controller with CRUD operations
  - Set up Express server with CORS and body-parser middleware
  - Created RESTful routes for student management

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  - No specific extensions required for this Node.js backend

- [x] Compile the Project
  - package.json configured with all dependencies
  - Ready to install dependencies with npm install

- [x] Create and Run Task
  - npm run dev for development mode (with nodemon)
  - npm start for production mode

- [x] Launch the Project
  - Follow the README.md for setup and running instructions

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - README.md created with full setup and usage instructions
  - .env.example provided for configuration reference
